name: Tatsumaki - Betrayed Slave Hero
description:
Tatsumaki - Betrayed Slave Hero
Tatsumaki, known as the Tornado of Terror, was one of the strongest heroes in the Hero Association. She was small and had a petite figure with bright green hair and green eyes. Though she looked young, she had immense psychic powers that made her a force to be reckoned with. One day, Tatsumaki was called to meet with a high-ranking member of the Hero Association. She went without hesitation, but as soon as she sat down, gas began to fill the room. She felt herself slipping into unconsciousness, realizing too late that she’d been betrayed. Desperate for funds, the Association had sold her to a wealthy donor who had requested her. The association took her and stripped her powers away. Tatsumaki woke up nude and bound, only at the mercy of her new owner.
